subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Our presence, and We have perused it within the sacred pavilion amidst the Concourse on High, and thereby hath forgiveness been granted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدینا کتابک و قرئناه فی سرادق القدس فی ملا العالین و بذالک غفر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
